authors: Shahira S. Fahmy Laila Abbas Aliaa K. ElShabassy a The American
raw_title: TikToking the Israel-Gaza War: A Content Analysis of Peace and War Narratives in Audiovisual News
title_en: TikToking the Israel-Gaza War: A Content Analysis of Peace and War Narratives in Audiovisual News
title_zh: TikTok上的以色列-加沙战争：视听新闻中和平与战争叙事的内容分析
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究分析了TikTok上关于以色列-加沙战争的视听新闻内容，重点研究其中和平与战争两种不同的叙事方式。通过系统分析视频内容，研究者想了解这些平台如何呈现冲突，以及不同叙事如何影响公众对战争的理解。
plain_summary_en: This study analyzes audiovisual news content about the Israel-Gaza war on TikTok, focusing on peace and war narratives. By systematically examining video content, researchers aim to understand how these platforms present the conflict and how different narratives shape public understanding of the war.
research_direction_zh: 探索社交媒体平台（特别是短视频平台）在冲突报道中的角色，分析数字新闻环境中叙事构建的方式及其对公众认知的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating the role of social media platforms (particularly short-video platforms) in conflict reporting, analyzing narrative construction in digital journalism environments and its impact on public perception.
